validation:is-not-blank-string.doc:name: VALIDATE: First Name is Not Blank

validation:is-true.doc:name: VALIDATE: Phone Number
validation:is-true.message: #["Phone number provided is not in the correct format. Phone number provided: '$(payload.phone)'"]

validation:is-email.doc:name: VALIDATE: Email
validation:is-email.message: #["Email provided is not in the correct format. Email provided: '$(payload.email)'"]

salesforce-composite:execute-composite-r.doc:name: CREATE: Contact

salesforce:query.doc:name: GET: Contact by UUID
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT UUID__c, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate, Salutation__c, FirstName__c, LastName__c, Pronouns__c, Email__c, Phone__c, Title__c, Department__c, Description__c FROM ContactInformation__c WHERE UUID__c = ':contactUuid' LIMIT 1

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Raw Query Result: $(write(vars.getContactResult, 'application/json'))"]
logger.doc:name: INFO: Log Raw Result

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var item = vars.getContactResult[0] --- if ( sizeOf(item) == 0 ) { message: "Resource not found" } else { id: item.UUID__c, salutation: item.Salutation__c, firstName: item.FirstName__c, lastName: item.LastName__c, email: item.Email__c, phone: item.Phone__c, title: item.Title__c, department: item.Department__c, description: item.Description__c, createdAt: item.CreatedDate, modifiedAt: item.LastModifiedDate }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java
var item = vars.getContactResult --- if (sizeOf(item) == 0) 404 else 200

salesforce:upsert.doc:name: UPSERT: Contact by UUID

salesforce:query.doc:name: QUERY: Contact by UUID
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id FROM ContactInformation__c WHERE UUID__c = ':contactUuid' LIMIT 1

raise-error.doc:name: RAISE: Delete Failed Error
raise-error.description: Was unable to delete the contact

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] Contact deleted: $(vars.id)"]
logger.doc:name: INFO: Deleted Contact

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var q = attributes.queryParams.q default "" var supplierUuid = vars.id default "" var limit = attributes.queryParams.limit default 25 var offset = attributes.queryParams.offset default 0
var fieldsToSearch = [ "FirstName__c", "LastName__c", "Email__c", "Phone__c", "Title__c", ]
var likeClause = "(" ++ ((fieldsToSearch map (f) -> "$(f) LIKE '%$(q)%'") joinBy " OR ") ++ ")"
var baseQuery = "SELECT UUID__c, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate, FirstName__c, LastName__c, Phone__c, Email__c, Salutation__c, Pronouns__c, Title__c, Description__c " ++ "FROM ContactInformation__c WHERE Supplier__r.UUID__c = '$(supplierUuid)'"
var extendedQuery = if (!isEmpty(q)) "$(baseQuery) AND $(likeClause)" else baseQuery --- extendedQuery ++ " LIMIT $(limit) OFFSET $(offset)"

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Query Contacts Result: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]
logger.doc:name: INFO: Query Contacts Result
